# Release Notes Template

Use this template when creating a new release. Copy the relevant section from `CHANGELOG.md`.

## What's Changed

### New Features
- List new features here

### Improvements
- List improvements and enhancements here

### Bug Fixes
- List bug fixes here

### Technical Changes
- List technical or tooling changes here

## Installation

Download `OneButtonPet.zip` and extract it to your `World of Warcraft/_classic_/Interface/AddOns/` directory.

## Usage

Use `/pettoggle` in a macro or bind `Toggle Pet Attack/Follow` under `Key Bindings -> AddOns`.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/voc0der/OneButtonPet/compare/vX.X.X...vX.X.X
